headings.text: Bang & Olufsen: Reviving Classics and Embracing Modernity with Beosystem 9000c and Beoconnect Core

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingBang & Olufsen: Reviving ClassicsPosted on July 3, 2024Bang & Olufsen: Reviving Classics and Embracing Modernity with Beosystem 9000c and Beoconnect Core‍‍A Tribute to Iconic Design: The Beosystem 9000cBang & Olufsen’s Beosystem 9000c is a stunning reimagination of the classic Beosound 9000 CD player from the 1990s, complemented by the cutting-edge Beolab 28 loudspeakers. Limited to just 200 units, this system marks the second installment in Bang & Olufsen’s Recreated Classics series.‍‍The Essence of Timeless CraftsmanshipAt the heart of the Beosystem 9000c lies a meticulously restored Beosound 9000 CD player, originally designed by David Lewis in 1996. Each unit undergoes a thorough inspection and restoration process by skilled technicians in Struer, Denmark. The modern refurb features a striking Cosmic Black finish on the aluminum back plate, juxtaposed with a Natural Aluminum control panel, enhancing the graphic edge of the original design.‍‍Unmatched Sound Quality and Modern FeaturesThe Beosystem 9000c, priced at £45,000 (€50,000 / $55,000), promises a powerful listening experience with Beolab 28 speakers. Equipped with Dolby Atmos support and various wireless connectivity options such as Airplay 2, Chromecast, and Bluetooth 5.0, this blend of classic design and modern technology ensures that your existing Bang & Olufsen system is enhanced with further longevity beyond just the physical life of your components. Your system is ready for 2024 and beyond.‍‍Innovating Connectivity: The Beoconnect CoreTransforming Legacy SystemsThe new Bang & Olufsen Beoconnect Core is designed to make streaming accessible with almost any Bang & Olufsen audio system, converting older speakers into a wireless system. This streaming box is equipped with various connections, including USB, Powerlink, and HDMI with ARC or eARC, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of systems, even those used for decades.‍‍Seamless Integration and Modern DesignBased on the Bang & Olufsen Mozart Platform, the Beoconnect Core offers a compact and elegant design with a bead-blasted aluminum housing. It integrates seamlessly into any modern living environment while supporting advanced streaming technologies. With features like Line In for connecting record players and third-party screens, the Beoconnect Core embodies Bang & Olufsen’s goal to build products that last a lifetime.‍‍A Future-Proof SolutionAs Michael Henriksson, Vice President of Product Marketing at Bang & Olufsen, states, "Beoconnect Core connects our past with our future and comes with our interchangeable Mozart streaming module that can be easily upgraded to the latest technology." This ensures that beloved Bang & Olufsen products continue to deliver memorable moments for years to come.‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍What is the Bang & Olufsen Beosystem 9000c?‍The Bang & Olufsen Beosystem 9000c is a modern reimagination of the classic Beosound 9000 CD player, featuring the iconic design from the 1990s and equipped with contemporary technology.‍How many units of the Beosystem 9000c are available?‍The Beosystem 9000c is limited to just 200 units, making it a highly exclusive item in Bang & Olufsen’s Recreated Classics series.‍What is special about the Beosound 9000 CD player in the Beosystem 9000c?‍The Beosound 9000 CD player in the Beosystem 9000c has been meticulously restored and modernized, featuring a Cosmic Black finish on the aluminum back plate and a Natural Aluminum control panel.‍What speakers are included with the Beosystem 9000c?‍The Beosystem 9000c comes with Beolab 28 speakers, known for their powerful listening experience and support for Dolby Atmos and various wireless connectivity options.‍What wireless connection options does the Beosystem 9000c support?‍The Beosystem 9000c supports Airplay 2, Chromecast, and Bluetooth 5.0, ensuring modern wireless connectivity for a seamless audio experience.‍How much is he Beosystem 9000c?‍The Beosystem 9000c is priced at £45,000 (€50,000 / $55,000), reflecting its blend of classic design and modern technology.‍What is the Bang & Olufsen Beoconnect Core?‍The Beoconnect Core is a streaming box designed to convert older Bang & Olufsen speakers into a modern wireless system, offering compatibility with a wide range of legacy systems.‍What connections does the Beoconnect Core support?‍The Beoconnect Core supports USB, Powerlink, HDMI with ARC or eARC, and Line In for connecting record players and third-party screens.‍What does the Beoconnect Core do?‍The Beoconnect Core aims to make streaming accessible with almost any Bang & Olufsen audio system, allowing older speakers to be integrated into a modern wireless setup.‍How does the Beoconnect Core ensure future compatibility?‍The Beoconnect Core is based on the Bang & Olufsen Mozart Platform and features an interchangeable streaming module that can be easily upgraded to the latest technology, ensuring long-term compatibility and
